label: declining
title: Amara — Social Communication declining
detail: Last 3 sessions: 45%, 42%, 40%. Trending down toward 40%. Prior 3-session avg was 49%.
suggested_action: Review recent environmental or session changes and diagnose the barrier.

label: plateau_below
title: Ethan — Fine Motor plateaued at 45%
suggested_action: Intensify support, adjust prompting strategy, or generate updated materials.

label: plateau_at_target
title: Maya — Communication target met
detail: Maintaining 80% across last 3 sessions (target 80%). Consider fading supports, generalizing to new settings, or marking the goal mastered.
suggested_action: Fade prompts, generalize to new settings, or mark goal mastered.

label: plateau_at_target
title: Maya — Following Directions target met

label: regression_risk
title: Jaylen — Social Reciprocity regression risk
detail: Turn-taking progress is fragile. Jaylen met his 80% target in adult-led sessions, but peer turn-taking remains inconsistent. Any routine disruption (sub teacher, schedule change) could cause regression. Last peer-only session: 2/5 turns successful.
suggested_action: Increase structured peer turn-taking practice with Thomas trains. Add visual turn-taking timer. Prepare social story for substitute teacher days.
